reasoning: Today we're focusing on the lactate clearance limiter. Your last ride showed moderate intensity, providing a good base. Now, let's prepare for the Alpine Loop by enhancing your ability to clear lactate and sustain power over longer durations, crucial for the main 8.5-mile climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-Unders: 6x (3 minutes at 242-256W, 3 minutes at 201-218W) with 1 minute easy between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
